ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Telephone number of the location */,
  "local_time" TEXT /* Local time at the location */,
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of service offered at this location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the location */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the location */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_service_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_type_id") REFERENCES service_types ("service_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_types" (
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service type */,
  "service_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the service type (e.g., distribution center, retail outlet) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the service type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the service type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_updates_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the location */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the location was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area covered by the zip code */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the zip code is applicable */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the zip code is applicable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the zip code record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the zip code record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zip_codes_zip_code FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code") REFERENCES locations ("zip_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the city record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the city record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_city_name FOREIGN KEY ("city_name") REFERENCES locations ("city")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state (e.g., Southeast, West) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the state record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_state_name FOREIGN KEY ("state_name") REFERENCES locations ("state")
)
